overall.description: Aerial drone footage from GTA V showing a high-speed tour around Los Santos International Airport hangars and surrounding industrial warehouses on a bright sunny day. The camera smoothly navigates from the airport perimeter through open dirt terrain and industrial complexes.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport perimeter with retaining wall and approaching hangars

agents.ego_description: flying forward along the airport perimeter wall at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running parallel to the flight path
large arched hangar building with glass facade and metal frame
green leafy trees scattered across the open area

segments.scene_description: Flying along a stone retaining wall at the airport perimeter with large arched hangar buildings visible ahead on the left and scattered trees to the right. The ground is a mix of concrete and dirt under clear midday sun with no other activity present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt field with undulating terrain mounds

events.description: passing the airport hangars and entering open dirt terrain with mounds

agents.ego_description: flying over undulating dirt terrain moving away from the airport structures

entered.detail: undulating dirt mounds and ridges covering the ground
city buildings visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the hangars, the camera flies over open undulating dirt terrain with prominent mounds and ridges. The airport structures fall behind as distant urban buildings appear on the horizon under bright sunlight.

events.description: slight ascent while approaching the industrial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: flying toward the industrial warehouse district over dirt ramps

entered.detail: large industrial building with corrugated metal siding and flat roof

segments.scene_description: Flying over open dirt terrain featuring prominent ramps and ridges toward a modern industrial warehouse complex. Large metal warehouse buildings grow larger in the frame while the distant city skyline shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse complex with loading docks

events.description: entering narrow passages between industrial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating between industrial warehouse buildings through narrow passages

entered.detail: narrow dirt passage between large industrial structures
raised concrete loading platform with metal doors

segments.scene_description: Moving through the industrial complex between large corrugated metal warehouse buildings. The camera navigates narrow dirt passages with concrete loading docks visible, transitioning from open terrain to a more enclosed industrial environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley opening to urban vista

events.description: exiting the industrial area through a narrow gap to reveal distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: flying through narrow gap between warehouses toward open city view

entered.detail: dense urban cityscape with multiple buildings visible through the gap
opening at the end of the narrow passage leading to open area

segments.scene_description: Flying through a narrow alley between warehouse walls, emerging to reveal a distant city skyline. The passage opens from the enclosed industrial area to a broader urban vista, transitioning from the warehouse complex to the open city view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the open perimeter of an airport into a dense industrial complex before finally revealing a distant urban skyline. It begins by gliding along a stone retaining wall past large arched hangars and scattered trees under a bright midday sun. As the camera moves past the airport structures, the environment shifts to undulating dirt terrain with prominent mounds and ridges, while city buildings slowly emerge on the horizon. The scene then progresses toward a modern industrial warehouse complex, where the open landscape gives way to narrow dirt passages and corrugated metal walls with concrete loading docks. Finally, the camera navigates through a tight alley between warehouse walls before emerging into a broad vista that opens up to the distant city skyline.
